items.title: ARC-110 loop-segregation C2 release validation (CORRECTED RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-707b): does parallel loop segregation lift committed-action-class entropy above the single arena AND a valid same-layer null, measured on a FRESH-SELECT-ONLY DV with a graded limbic-competition gate and divergence headroom?
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING. INSTRUMENT REPAIR of V3-EXQ-707b per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-707b_2026-07-20 (REE_assembly fc0ceff52d + 544a0633ab, CONFIRMED / user-gated), which WITHDREW 707b's evidence_direction=weakens on ARC-110 as a measurement_test_design_defect AND withdrew the narrowing derived from it (necessary-but-not-sufficient / conversion route requires learned DA-gated cross-loop arbitration, MECH-448/449/ARC-107). ARC-110 therefore returns to UNTESTED on the single-arena-artefact question -- neither weakened nor narrowed -- and 707c is the venue that recovers it. The DA-gated-arbitration hypothesis survives as biology but 707b is NOT evidence for it. DEFECT (form 2, hold-weighted E3 readout): 707b accumulated committed_class_counts on EVERY P2 env step (707b:1023-1035) gated only by is_p2 with no ticks['e3_tick'] guard, while ree_core/agent.py:5429 returns the HELD action before e3.select() is reached at a cadence defaulting to 10 and MECH-093-modulated 5-20 (config.py:2017, clock.py:52-70), so the primary DV committed_class_entropy_nats was an entropy over a HOLD-WEIGHTED histogram. e3_diagnostics_staleness_lint (form 1) is structurally blind to it (no latch is touched). DISQUALIFYING on both counts: an entropy is a distribution-SHAPE statistic, and hold duration is CLASS-dependent while arm exposure differs by up to +97.6% (s45) / +49.8% (s42) / -23.8% (s47), so it does not cancel; the 663 matched-replay calibration explicitly does not cover this shape (autopsy 699 sec 4d: different statistic class, different arm symmetry, 1-2 orders of magnitude). DECISIVE: the A1-vs-null contrast the pre-registered DECISIVE branch depends on was SIGN-INCONSISTENT across all three divergent seeds (-0.1173 s42, -0.0678 s44, +0.1687 s46), every magnitude within/adjacent to the 0.115-0.134 nat band 699 demonstrated hold-weighting alone can move, and the pooled +0.0153 nats is 8x BELOW that floor -- so the instrument could not distinguish A1>null from A1~null from A1<null and the branch 707b took was UNREACHABLE whichever way the bias ran. THE EIGHT REPAIRS (autopsy sec 8): (1) FRESH-SELECT-ONLY DV -- agent.e3.last_score_diagnostics cleared to None immediately before EVERY select_action, DV accumulated only if it repopulated (v3_exq_785a:525-543 pattern); the random-fallback action (707b:993-997) is ALSO excluded and counted separately, an independent inflation path 707b had. (2) n_fresh_select / n_latched / n_dv_ticks / fresh_select_yield emitted per arm-seed IN THE MANIFEST (not a per_tick_sink: Phase 3 workers POST only manifest_bytes). (3) n_p2_ticks + exposure_imbalance_vs_a0 per arm-seed -- REPORTED, NEVER GATING. (4) fresh_selects_sufficient readiness guard (>= 30 genuine fresh selects on EVERY arm-seed, measured on the WORST cell to match the all() quantifier so the indexer's recompute agrees) so an underpowered DV self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens. REACHABILITY CHECKED against 707b's frozen record rather than assumed (699b/62b3f43 found its analogous floor of 100 was THIN): 707b's worst cell had 1409 P2 ticks -> ~282 fresh at cadence 5, ~169 at 785a's measured 0.12 yield, ~141 at cadence 10, ~70 at the slowest cadence 20 = 2.3x margin even at the pessimistic bound. (5) DIVERGENCE-HEADROOM guard (NEW) -- 707b's enough_divergent_seeds cleared at EXACTLY 3.0/3.0 with seed 47 missing the 0.05 floor by 0.00064 (1.3%), on a statistic ITSELF drawn from the contaminated cache path (agent.py:4812 returns CACHED candidates on a non-E3 tick). 707c fixes BOTH ends: the divergence statistic is recomputed on FRESH TICKS ONLY, MIN_DIVERGENT_SEEDS raised 3 -> 4, SEEDS widened 6 -> 8 so 4 is REACHABLE rather than nominal (raising the bar without widening the pool would just convert a zero-headroom pass into a near-certain requeue), and the per-seed margin to the floor is reported for EVERY seed including those that cleared. The identical 3.0/3.0 condition is flagged in 708 -- LINEAGE-WIDE fragility, not a 707b quirk. (6) GRADED limbic-routing readout (NEW) -- 707b's named_channel_routing_live read EXACTLY 1.414214 = sqrt(2) on every arm and every seed (ZERO variance across all 24 cells). DIAGNOSED as a STRUCTURAL CONSTANT of project_channel_range (e3_selector.py:124-177): the projection centers the [K,D] feature matrix and projects onto its leading right-singular vector, so a channel routed as ORTHONORMAL one-hot rows yields ||e_i - e_j|| = sqrt(2) whenever >= 2 candidates occupy distinct categories -- independent of K, seed and arm. It is therefore BINARY LIVENESS ONLY and is retained as exactly that with its framing corrected in the precondition description (the '1.414 >> 0.001' reading is NOT a 1414x margin on a graded magnitude). The MAGNITUDE half of C2's non-degeneracy claim now rests on a NEW precondition limbic_graded_competition_live reading loop_limbic_pref_range (e3_selector.py:1881-1883, the range of the z-scored limbic-loop accumulation across ELIGIBLE candidates, peaked over FRESH selections), which IS genuinely graded in the 707b record: 0.013 .. 3.12 across cells, hard ZERO on A0 where routing is off, and it DISSOCIATES exactly where C2 requires -- s43 collapses A1 1.0931 -> DROP 0.0133 (98.8% loss) while assoc_pref_range RISES to receive the remapped channels. A non-gating limbic_ablation_effect block reports that dissociation per divergent seed on PASS runs too. NO ree_core CHANGE: both diagnostics already exist and 707b already collected them, it just never gated on the graded one. (7) supersedes V3-EXQ-707b on entry + manifest. (8) stamp_recording_core via write_flat_manifest WITH arm_results hoisted to the manifest TOP LEVEL so the multi-arm substrate_hash hoist actually fires -- manifest_core.py:117-131 reads manifest['arm_results'] and nothing else, and 707b nested it under 'result', so the hoist silently returned None and the landed 707b manifest carries NO substrate_hash at all (6 always-core fields missing: recording_schema, substrate_hash, machine_class, elapsed_seconds, config, seeds) despite all 24 cells having good fingerprints. Also fixed: write_flat_manifest was passed the module-level SEEDS rather than the RUN's seeds, so a dry-run manifest misdescribed itself. DENOMINATOR CONSISTENCY: frac_pre_ge2's numerator moves to fresh-only with its denominator (707b divided a now-fresh numerator by RAW n_p2_ticks would deflate the saturated 1.0 by ~10x). RETAINED FROM 707b, re-confirmed not re-established (autopsy sec 3): in_layer_null_live (strict >0 tick count, 1700-18072 on ARM_NOISE vs HARD ZERO on A0/A1 -- threshold-invariant, replication cannot manufacture a positive from an all-zero record; the same-layer null the single arena could NOT construct, the 704b/706b binding constraint, was genuinely built) and frac_pre_ge2 (exactly 1.0 all 24 cells, saturated). The loop substrate is BUILT and demonstrably LIVE -- this is instrument repair, NOT a substrate build, so NOT /implement-substrate. RE-DERIVE BRAKE NOT FIRED: autopsy targets[0].re_derive_brake.fired=false -- the category is measurement_test_design_defect so the counting rule (substrate_ceiling / non_contributory-as-ceiling) is not met, and this re-adjudication WITHDRAWS the 2026-06-29 weakens rather than adding a second, so ARC-110's ceiling count moves to 0, not 2. The naive Step-2.5b count returns 5 for ARC-110, but it does not hold: the 707b entry is this very autopsy (measurement defect, fired:false), and 709 / 711 / 713 / 711-713 tag ARC-110 while testing DIFFERENT mechanisms (learned cross-loop arbitration, ascending spiral gain, bounded parity controller) -- not the 707 single-arena-artefact granularity. The brake stops a claim re-tested at the SAME granularity against the SAME ceiling letter after letter; 707c is the sanctioned V3-EXQ-785 -> 785a / 708 -> 708a instrument-repair shape. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is committed-class entropy on a fresh-select-only denominator; reanalysis_query --readout committed_class_entropy_nats --claim ARC-110 returns 6 manifests (707/707a/707b/709/711/713) ALL flagged UNVERIFIABLE (no recoverable substrate_hash) AND all carrying the readout computed under the SAME hold-weighted defect; 707b's replication factor is unobservable from its recorded emission (no per-tick sink, no fresh-select telemetry, only per-arm-seed scalars) -> NOT recoverable by reanalysis -> run. 708a CONTEXT: V3-EXQ-708a is in flight (claimed ree-cloud-2 2026-07-20T05:23:08Z) having DROPPED its ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG arm on 707b's now-withdrawn authority. It is correctly allowed to complete (its MECH-440 question and repaired instrument are unaffected), but the route-to-ARC-110 branch is UNMEASURED, not settled, and 708a must NOT be read as bearing on ARC-110 in either direction -- it is silent on it by construction. ARC-110 is recovered HERE, not by restoring that arm to 708a. ILLUSORY-CONFLICT CHECK (autopsy 7b): withdrawing 707b leaves NO uncontaminated positive leg for the MECH-439 intrinsic-ceiling reading -- 700d/704b turn entirely on a disqualified statistic, 700b must not be cited in either direction, 700c/704 are SAFE but are readiness requeues rather than ceiling findings, 706b unadjudicated, 708 withdrawn. That reading is NOT refuted but must not be cited as established pending 707c. PROVENANCE NOTE: 707c was copied from the WORKING-TREE 707b, which carried an uncommitted crf_matured-precondition improvement staged by session jovial-joliot-9f904b (13 scripts). That edit is complete and self-consistent and is inherited deliberately; it is that session's work to commit on 707b, and 707c's commit touches only its own new file plus the queue. validate_experiments.py --strict --paths: OK, 0 non-conforming, 0 stale-e3-diagnostics warnings, 0 hold-weighted-readout warnings (707b fires the hold-weighted lint; 707c does not) -- the two lints specific to the repaired defect. 1 inherited anchor-reachability advisory (707b fires it too; non-blocking) covering 8 inherited anchors + the 2 new ones, whose reachability is instead argued from 707b's frozen record in the constants. SMOKE: --dry-run PASS 2026-07-20, 4/4 arms completed, correctly self-routed outcome=FAIL / label=substrate_not_ready_requeue for the toy run (n_divergent=0 against the raised floor of 4) -- i.e. it declined to emit a verdict on an underpowered instrument, which is the branch 707b failed to take. VERIFIED IN THE RETAINED DRY-RUN MANIFEST (707c adds --keep-dry-manifest for exactly this reason: 707b unlinked its smoke manifest unconditionally, so its own smoke was never auditable; used with --out-dir OUTSIDE evidence/ so the indexer never sees a toy manifest): all SIX previously-missing always-core fields now present (recording_schema=rec/v1, substrate_hash=c71e9af54a11..., machine_class=darwin-arm64-py3.13-torch2.12.0, elapsed_seconds, config, seeds=[42] = the RUN's seeds not the module SEEDS) with arm_results confirmed at the manifest TOP LEVEL so the multi-arm hoist fired; fresh_selects_sufficient measured=39 (worst cell) vs threshold 30 = MET; divergence_headroom emitted headroom=-4 with the per-seed margin (-0.031995, -64.0% of floor) recorded; limbic_graded_competition_live evaluated and loop_limbic_pref_range_peak collected on the loop arms (A1 3.2024 / NOISE 4.3112 / DROP 3.3153) and hard 0.0000 on A0 where routing is off, confirming repair 6 reads a genuinely graded quantity. FRESHNESS GUARD CONFIRMED DISCRIMINATING: per-arm n_latched 22 (A0) / 0 (A1) / 15 (NOISE) / 17 (DROP) -- a broken guard would report 0 latched on ALL arms. CAVEAT for a future reader, so a high toy yield is not misread as the 708 defect signature: dry-run fresh_select_yield is 0.67-1.00, far above the ~0.12 785a measured on a real run, because DRY_RUN_STEPS=30 makes episodes terminate in ~10-17 ticks and E3 fires near episode start. The yield tracks episode length monotonically across the four arms (A1 10.0 ticks/ep -> 1.000; NOISE 13.5 -> 0.722; DROP 15.0 -> 0.717; A0 16.8 -> 0.672), and A1's n_p2_ticks == n_fresh_select == 40 is that saturation, NOT a failed guard. At the real 200 steps/episode the yield should fall to ~0.1; n_p2_ticks == n_fresh_select on a FULL run WOULD be the 708 signature and should be treated as one. SCHEDULE: 4 arms x 8 seeds = 32 cells at 250 episodes (P0 100 warmup + P1 50 bias-train + P2 100 measure), 200 steps/episode. estimated_minutes 1600 scaled from 708a's 900 for 18 cells; 707b recorded no elapsed_seconds (part of the recording gap this letter closes), so this is a scaled estimate rather than a measured one.

items.title: MECH-477 falsifier: SD-081 dual-system uncertainty arbitrator OFF vs ON on the 786a recruitment design, with a non-degenerate depth-2 habit read and the mandatory arbitration-weight manipulation check
items.note: MECH-477 FALSIFIER. Two-arm SD-081 arbitrator OFF vs ON re-run of the V3-EXQ-786a dual-system recruitment design. SD-081 (e3.dualsystem_uncertainty_arbitration) landed in ree-v3 on 2026-07-22; before it, E3 scored candidates with an unconditional full-horizon J(zeta), so no weight existed anywhere between the myopic and the deep read and nothing COULD respond to novelty. Turned on via cfg.e3.use_dualsystem_arbitration=True at the REGISTERED DEFAULTS (gain 4.0, bias 0.0, uncertainty EMA alpha 0.05, habit depth 2) -- not re-tuned: the claim under test is about the registered substrate. THE PARAMS LIVE ON E3Config, NOT REEConfig (a REEConfig-level field reads as a missing attribute in the selector and silently defaults False). OFF ARM IS NOT 786a AS-RUN. MECH-477's what_would_answer says it is; that is no longer true. 786a's recruitment DV was itself degenerate (SD-081 evidence_quality_note, confirmed by measurement): first-step = evaluate_trajectory(world_seq[:, :1, :]) and index 0 is the CURRENT state shared by every candidate, so that vector was CONSTANT (n_unique=1 over 32 candidates, range exactly 0, every tick), its _spearman guard could not fire (it tests RANK std, and double-argsort of a constant is a permutation of 0..K-1, std 9.23), and the DV measured stable-sort tie-break noise -- simulated mean 1.0173 sd 0.1871 against the manifest's 1.01725. So BOTH arms are freshly run at HABIT_DEPTH=2, and readiness now gates the cross-candidate RANGE **and** the DISTINCT-VALUE FRACTION of the HABIT vector, not only the full-horizon vector -- gating only the latter is exactly why 786a passed readiness with a degenerate DV. Range and distinctness, never magnitude (V3-EXQ-643). Smoke measured habit range 1.1e-3/2.0e-3 and distinct-fraction 0.969: the degeneracy is gone. This run does NOT adjudicate 786a and marks nothing reviewed -- that is separate /failure-autopsy work. MANDATORY MANIPULATION CHECK, and one leg of it is an ARITHMETIC IDENTITY. MECH-477 makes it mandatory that the arbitration weight vary with measured uncertainty, else a null is a readiness failure scoring nothing. agent.e3.last_arbitration is sampled ONLY on a real E3 tick (cleared before every select_action; a None reading counts as n_latched and records nothing -- the E3 cadence defaults to 10 steps/tick, so a per-step read would be ~10x pseudo-replicated). The natural form -- rank correlation between w_planned and (u_habit_norm - u_planned_norm) -- IS measured and gated at 0.99, but w = sigmoid(gain*diff + bias) is strictly monotone in that difference, so rho is 1.0 BY ARITHMETIC (measured 1.000000). It is a no-numerical-pathology check, NOT evidence of responsiveness. The non-vacuous legs carry that: ARB-LIVE (>=95% of ON ticks non-degenerate; smoke 40/40), ARB-SOURCE (>=95% resolve u_habit through the FAMILIARITY path; smoke 40/40) and ARB-W-RANGE (cross-tick w range > 0.05; smoke 0.688). ARB-SOURCE is not stylistic: with curiosity_weight=0.0 the E1-novelty-EMA fallback was MEASURED on this config returning u_habit_raw = 0.0 on EVERY tick, so u_habit_norm is constant and the novelty channel MECH-477 is about never varies. ARB-W-RANGE is NULL-QUALIFYING ONLY (applies_to = ON arm AND C1 failed): a frozen weight cannot refute the claim, but voiding a POSITIVE result on a proxy would be the V3-EXQ-785 vacating failure in a new costume. CURIOSITY IS ON IN BOTH ARMS AND ITS SCORER LEVER IS MEASURABLY INERT. cfg.hippocampal.curiosity_weight=0.05 is what builds hippocampal.familiarity_tracker, which the arbitrator's preferred u_habit path requires. 786a refused curiosity because SD-025 also makes the CEM scorer novelty-sensitive, which would make a single-arm leg-(1) claim circular. Resolved by MEASUREMENT, not dismissal: the bonus scales with SD-024 representational density and benefit_terrain_live_producer defaults False, so the cross-candidate curiosity-bonus RANGE is 0.0 EXACTLY (smoke, both arms; V3-EXQ-795 independently pins zero benefit centers on the OFF-producer path). It is gated as a CEILING precondition, fail-closed at +inf if ever unmeasurable. And it is common-mode anyway: C1 is a difference-in-differences with curiosity held identical across arms. DV-SYMMETRY DECLARATION (per arm, mandatory). DV = 1 - spearman(full, habit_depth), a rank correlation, so its symmetry group is the MONOTONE TRANSFORMS of the candidate score vectors. arb_off: the manipulation is the familiarity contrast (hazard/resource/ landmark density), which changes the WORLD STATES candidates roll through and hence their relative deep-vs-shallow ordering -- not any monotone remap of a fixed vector. NOT invariant. arb_on: the arbitrator does NOT enter the DV directly (the DV reads residue_field.evaluate_trajectory, not E3's arbitrated scores); it acts SECOND-ORDER through the committed action stream -> states visited -> candidate sets proposed. A real causal path, not an identity, so NOT invariant -- but because it is indirect, C2 reads the allocation weight DIRECTLY (novel minus familiar mean w_planned, floor 0.01) as a secondary non-load-bearing criterion. SCORING (MECH-477's own). C1 load-bearing SUPPORTED when BOTH: the novel-minus-familiar recruitment delta is strictly greater ON than OFF on >=2/3 of DIVERGENT seeds (|delta_on - delta_off| > 0.005, >=3 such seeds required), AND the ON-arm delta clears mean - 1.0*SEM > 0.02 (786a's power-derived absolute leg; 786a's own 0.0133 mean is NOT used as an effect-size estimate -- it was measured on a degenerate DV -- only its SD, as noise). REFUTED when C1 fails with every gate green INCLUDING ARB-W-RANGE and the ON arm is flat (bar fails AND |Cohen's d| < 0.1). Otherwise mixed. Red gates route substrate_not_ready_requeue / non_contributory and weight NOTHING. C1 is a CROSS-ARM contrast so a red arm genuinely vacates it -- expressed via non_degenerate_per_claim rather than a whole-run false, so a red OFF arm does not vacate the ON arm's own MECH-163 leg-(1) read (which uses 786a's two legs: mean-SEM > 0.02 AND d >= 0.8). HELD FIXED FROM 786a: the familiarity manipulation (familiar 10/3/5/2 vs novel 14/7/2/5, all locally observable in the 5x5 field views), env_drift_prob 0.0 in both, the AUC manipulation-check bar (substantive > 0.70 plus an above-chance SEM leg > 0.50), the calibrated familiarity query/update bandwidth pair 0.20/1.0 pinned by the experiment (NOT read from config -- the same constant is update()'s association threshold and was moved 1.0 -> 0.20 on 2026-07-20), n=8 seeds. MINT AS YOU GO: the whole cell lives in the new canonical lineage module experiments/_lib/baselines/mech477_dualsystem_arbitration.py (inside the arm-fingerprint substrate glob, so any change to what a cell computes correctly refuses a stale reuse), and both arms emit with include_driver_script_in_hash=False -- so the OFF arm is minted cross-driver reuse-eligible for 811a onward with zero extra compute and NO separate mint job. Smoke confirmed reuse_eligible true, no ineligibility reasons, top-level substrate_hash hoisted from the per-cell fingerprints. GOV-REUSE-1 (Step 2.4): decisive readout is the per-seed novel-minus-familiar recruitment delta under arbitrator ON vs OFF, plus the w_planned series. Checked every manifest via reanalysis_query: recruitment_delta exists only in 786 (substrate_hash 67c01b2d) and 786a (f23fff59), both PRE-SD-081 substrates where the knob did not exist, and both computed with the degenerate depth-1 habit read; NO manifest anywhere carries w_planned or any arbitration readout. Not recoverable -> it runs. RE-DERIVE BRAKE (Step 2.5b): count 0 for MECH-477 (registered 2026-07-22, no prior autopsy) and 0 for MECH-163. Clear. READINESS (Step 2.5): SD-081 IMPLEMENTED + contract-pinned in ree-v3/CLAUDE.md; no phased training required (no learned parameters -- deliberately not a learned gate, which would confound 'the arbitrator works' with 'the gate trained'); MECH-094 N/A. ETHICS PREFLIGHT: all involvement flags false, decision allow. SMOKE PASS (--dry-run, 2 seeds x 2 arms): validate_experiments --strict OK, validate_recording --strict OK, per-arm gate correctly scopes all four arbitration preconditions OUT of the OFF arm, 4/4 cells fingerprinted.

items.title: Channel-routing route_range cross-class magnitude replication -- 790 re-run, gate fix only (arm-scoped preconditions + cadence-derived fresh-select floor)
items.note: SAME-QUESTION RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-790 with a GATE FIX ONLY -- no substrate build, no design change. Design, env, arms, seeds, schedule and SCIENCE thresholds are 790's verbatim; only the readiness gate's SCOPE and DERIVATION change. WHY: failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-790_2026-07-22.md (confirmed, user-adjudicated 'Gate defect -- uphold the science'). 790 PASSED BOTH science criteria -- routing active in 10/10 ARM_1_ROUTE_ON seeds and inactive in 10/10 ARM_0_NO_ROUTE seeds (C1); committed-class TV above floor on 8/10 seeds against a bar of 7 (C2); routed bias range supra-floor 0.334 vs 0.01 and bounded 1.644 vs 1e6 -- yet self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue and was flagged precondition_unmet on ONE failed precondition: adequate_fresh_selection_sample, worst cell 53 vs a floor of 200, at ARM_0_NO_ROUTE::seed49 -- one seed of the CONTROL arm, whose route_range is structurally 0.0 and from which no C1/C2 statistic is estimated. FIX 1 (arm-scoping): the sample gate is applied only to ARM_1_ROUTE_ON, the arm whose statistics are estimated from the selection sample, via the shared experiments/_lib/precondition_gate.py (the pattern V3-EXQ-794 per_arm_gate and V3-EXQ-737 recorded_preconditions already use). ARM_0 keeps the one gate that IS meaningful for it -- routing inactivity must be OBSERVABLE (>=1 genuine selection per cell) -- and its full per-cell counts are carried NON-GATING in recorded_preconditions. interpretation.preconditions carries green-arm entries only, because the REE_assembly indexer's _compute_adjudication reads that list FLAT and ARM-BLIND and returns whole-run precondition_unmet on the first unmet entry, so the driver is the only place this can be fixed. FIX 2 (floor re-derivation): 790's 200 came from the NOMINAL default cadence (3600 window ticks / heartbeat.e3_steps_per_tick=10 -> ~360), but the live E3 cadence is MECH-093-modulated over clock.beta_rate_min_steps=5 .. beta_rate_max_steps=20, so the same window yields 180..720 selections and a floor of 200 sat ABOVE the substrate's own worst case. Replaced by (a) FRESH_SELECT_FLOOR = 3600/20 = 180, the modulated range's worst case, against a count quantifier matching the >=7-of-10 criterion it guards (measured = the 7th-largest per-seed count, an order statistic, the same shape arm1_routed_bias_range_supra_floor already used); and (b) FRESH_SELECT_YIELD_FLOOR = 1/20 = 0.05, the same bound as a fraction of the cell's OBSERVED tick count and therefore truncation-invariant. The yield leg is the load-bearing half: 790's measured per-cell yields were 0.100..0.181 (effective cadence 5.5..10 steps/selection, at or FASTER than nominal, never near the slow end), so the real cause of the starved cells was WINDOW TRUNCATION (per-cell windows ran 330..3600 ticks because episodes end early on `done`), not slow arousal -- which supersedes the autopsy's 'sat at the slow end' reading and is exactly what the yield form is immune to. NOT WEAKENED: the pseudo-replication protection the gate exists to provide is UNCHANGED and still load-bearing. The corrected denominator (e3.last_score_diagnostics cleared immediately before every select_action, so a latched tick contributes NO row) is byte-identical to 790's and closes the ~9x defect the shared 662/663 driver carried; n_fresh_select and n_latched_ticks are still emitted per cell. The yield gate is a STRICTLY STRONGER latch-pathology detector than the absolute count it supplements. No pseudo-replication threshold is lowered. VERIFIED: replaying the fixed _evaluate over V3-EXQ-790's OWN arm_results converts FAIL / substrate_not_ready_requeue / precondition_unmet -> PASS / route_range_substrate_ready, both arms green, all six preconditions met (ARM_1 7th-largest n_fresh_select 262 vs 180; worst ARM_1 yield 0.100 vs 0.05; ARM_0's starved 53 recorded non-gating). Smoke PASS (dry-run completes end-to-end; its FAIL is structural -- a 1-seed dry run cannot satisfy a k=7 order statistic, as in 790). validate_experiments.py --strict: OK, 0 warnings of any class. DOWNSTREAM (the point of the run): unblocks the per-claim behavioural retests of ARC-065 / MECH-294 / ARC-062 / MECH-309 / MECH-341, each a SEPARATE /queue-experiment session. The autopsy already records the route-range routing substrate as READY on 790's evidence; 791a re-confirms it under a correctly-scoped gate. ROUTING: experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[] -- does NOT weight claim confidence; routes to /failure-autopsy, NOT /implement-substrate (the substrate under test works; the autopsy sets recommended_substrate_queue_entry.action='none'). GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout is the run's OWN adjudication under a corrected gate, which by construction exists in no recorded manifest -- 790's manifest carries the readouts but was adjudicated by the defective gate, and a completed run's pre-registered emission is not rewritten -> run. (The replay above is a design-time verification of the fix, not a substitute for the re-run's own pre-registered adjudication.) MACHINE: pinned ree-cloud-2 -- cloud preferred over the Mac (790's adjudicated leg ran darwin-arm64), and ree-cloud-3 is occupied by V3-EXQ-790 until ~2026-07-22T17Z. ETHICS PREFLIGHT: all involvement flags false, decision=allow (V3 waking action-selection diagnostic; no harm drive -- hazard_harm=0.0, num_hazards=0 -- no self-model, no sleep, no replay). RUNTIME: estimated_minutes=753 carried over from 790, which measured 28.23 s/episode on a contended Mac -> 37.6 min/cell x 20 cells; measured under contention so an UPPER bound.

items.title: MECH-204 Phase 7 x SD-076 calibration-loop 2x2 RE-RUN: repaired rv floor (scale-relative + softplus) gives the inflation lever usable dynamic range
items.note: SAME-QUESTION RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-794 (alphabetic suffix: the scientific question, the 2x3 factorial, the arms, the asymmetry levels, the DV and every pre-registered threshold are UNCHANGED). Supersedes run_id v3_exq_794_mech204_phase7_sd076_calibration_loop_2x2_20260721T113848Z_v3. Authorised by REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-794_2026-07-22.md (confirmed, user-adjudicated 2026-07-22), which routed to /implement-substrate (sd_waking_confidence_inflation_headroom) and then a same-question re-run -- explicitly NOT a redesign. WHY 794 TESTED NOTHING: E3Config.waking_confidence_rv_floor defaults to 0.01 while the un-inflated operating point is rv = 0.005420 (ARM_OFF_OFF) and true error is ~0.0037, so the absolute floor sat 1.8x ABOVE the operating point; max(0.01, rv) clamped on the first tick inflation bit and rv_final finished at EXACTLY 0.010000 on all four inflation arms with overconfidence_score bit-identical to 15 significant figures (-1.004111904519277) at asymmetry 0.6 AND 0.8. That is saturation, not a null: SD-076's does_not_support was WITHDRAWN to non_contributory and MECH-204 stayed unknown (C2's per_seed was empty because C1 never established an operative drift level). The sign was NOT the bug -- inflation drove rv DOWN correctly, into a floor above the OFF arm, so the inflation_lowers_rv gate saw rv rise. SUBSTRATE REPAIR CONSUMED: ree-v3 452f99e367 adds waking_confidence_rv_floor_relative_frac (set 0.2 here: the bound is now a FRACTION of the counterfactual un-inflated rv, so it scales with the substrate's own error scale and caps overconfidence at 0.8) and waking_confidence_rv_floor_mode='soft'/softness 0.25 (a strictly-monotonic softplus, so two doses can never map to one value). A smaller ABSOLUTE floor would not have sufficed: C1 needs rv < true error ~0.0037, unreachable under any bound anchored at 0.01. NEW PRE-SCORING GATE (the autopsy's acceptance target): the regime-conditioned precondition dose_levels_separated asserts on every inflation arm that its rv_final differs from its sibling at the other dose by > DOSE_SEPARATION_FLOOR (1e-4), so a still-clamped lever gates those arms RED and self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue instead of recording a refutation. Verified by replaying 794's exact clamped values through the analysis: all four inflation arms trip the gate and the standing dose_saturation lint reports not-separable, while the repaired values are all-green. n_seeds_overconfident >= 2 remains C1's existing MIN_SEEDS_OVERCONF gate. GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readouts ARE recorded in 794 but as the clamped 0.010000/0 -- and both 794 and 774 carry a different substrate_hash from this run by construction (the repair edits ree_core/predictors/e3_selector.py and ree_core/utils/config.py, both inside the substrate glob), so neither can answer it. Not recoverable -> run. Re-derive brake: 0 counted substrate_ceiling autopsies for BOTH MECH-204 and SD-076, so it does not fire (matching the autopsy's own section 7). Run shape unchanged from 794: 6 arms x 3 seeds, 30 train + 20 eval episodes, 200 steps, grid 12; 794 measured 104 min on ree-cloud-4. Smoke: --dry-run PASS, and the repair is visible in it -- rv_final is dose-ordered and separated (OFF_OFF 0.2990 / INFL_LO 0.2118 / INFL_HI 0.1899), readiness_ok=True where 794 had all four inflation arms RED, and C5_asymmetry_dose_response_monotone PASSES where 794 failed.

items.title: SD-MEL-PRODUCER validation: graded, above-reference, LEARNABLE waking MEL from a non-converging world
items.note: VALIDATES A TEST-BED, NOT A CLAIM. experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[] -- PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. Validation for substrate SD-MEL-PRODUCER, landed ree-v3 10e287ad30 (2026-07-21). GAP: MECH-180 link (i) novelty -> graded above-reference waking MEL. Link (ii) is owned by SD-MEL-CONSUMER and is already PROVEN (V3-EXQ-718a injection PC). Link (i) was never demonstrable because the environment produced NO novelty gradient: V3-EXQ-677 C1 measured 8.8e-07 against a 0.01 threshold; V3-EXQ-718a ecological MEL ~1e-5, noise-level and scrambled vs novelty level, conv_rel_drop ~0.98. Both autopsies: measurement_gap (environment/test-bed producer gap), NOT a substrate ceiling, NOT a falsification. ROOT CAUSE: env_drift_interval only MOVES hazards; the optimal prediction of a random walk is its mean, so PE floors at the irreducible noise level -- drift adds sampling NOISE, not learning LOAD. The new knob re-permutes the action->displacement map, which E2.world_forward takes as an INPUT. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: counts 3 (MECH-180) / 5 (INV-050), both over threshold. RELEASED per Step 2.5b(1) -- the named upstream substrate is now BUILT (SD-MEL-PRODUCER, ree-v3/CLAUDE.md), which is exactly the entry point the 718a autopsy named ('a graded-MEL environment/test-bed (continual-shift / non-converging world), NOT another same-environment novelty re-grade'). This run also tags NO claim, so no claim trips the brake. The brake still REFUSES a 673/718-family same-question re-queue, and a 798 PASS is NOT MECH-180 evidence -- it licenses a SEPARATE, still-gated ecological end-to-end run. ANTI-ARTIFACT DESIGN (the point of the experiment): grading observation NOISE would also yield a monotone MEL ladder, by construction on any substrate -- the DV-symmetry class (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-604c) that held V3-EXQ-683 on 2026-07-21. So ARM_4_NOISE is a matched-PE NEGATIVE CONTROL running the same shift schedule at depth=0 (schedule fires, rule never changes) plus obs noise, and C4 tests whether elevated PE is REDUCIBLE (decays within a stationary window under training) vs merely elevated. C4 needs a TRAINING phase because a frozen model cannot re-learn. The consumer is DELIBERATELY ABSENT: 718a learning_extracted[1] records that its DV is a deterministic function of MEL, so DV-monotone-in-measured-MEL is near-tautological and cannot validate a producer. DV-SYMMETRY per arm: graded arms' DV (mean per-step e3 prediction_error) is an ACTION-CONDITIONED residual and is NOT invariant under an action-map permutation (conditional-prediction argument, not distributional -- a uniform policy leaves the trajectory distribution unchanged while breaking the learned per-action mapping). ARM_4_NOISE is invariant by arithmetic; that is its role as a control and it is excluded from the C1 ladder. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is mean per-step e3 prediction_error under a graded world_rule_shift ladder. The knob did not exist before 2026-07-21, so NO recorded manifest can carry it on any substrate_hash -> not recoverable, run. MEASUREMENT: fixed STEP budget, not fixed episode count -- shift rate SHORTENS episodes (measured 69.0 -> 13.5 steps during implementation), which would give each arm a different episode-phase mix; mean_episode_length reported per arm. SMOKE PASS 2026-07-21 (5/5 arms, manifest + sentinel written, dry-run manifest correctly relocated out of evidence/). Full contract suite 2037 passed. ID NOTE: originally authored as V3-EXQ-796; 796 and 797 were taken by a concurrent MECH-266 session mid-session, so this moved to 798.

items.title: SD-080 prior probe: is action-object CONTENT load-bearing for EXQ-003's PASS?
items.note: PRIOR PROBE for the SD-080 falsifier (spike Sec 4.2 final paragraph): REE_assembly/evidence/planning/action_object_invariance_spike_2026-07-22.md. Re-runs EXQ-003's TERRAIN-vs-RANDOM contrast across 4 independent re-draws of E2.action_object_head x 3 seeds (12 cells). The head receives zero gradient (spike M0, replicated per-cell as ao_head_param_delta_after_warmup), so a re-draw is a pure content intervention; it is not a no-op on the planner because num_cem_iterations=3 and the legacy elite refit (module.py:1400-1409) reads back E2-computed action objects to refit ao_mean/ao_std. Every init including 0 is re-drawn inside a saved/restored global RNG state so the downstream stream is bit-identical across inits and the init effect is not confounded with stream drift. Keeps EXQ-003's config verbatim (alpha_world NOT raised to 0.9) because the question is what produced EXQ-003's PASS. READOUTS: D1 matched-state mean pairwise TV distance between inits' proposed first-action distributions (ceil 0.05); D2 across-init spread of survival_ratio = terrain/random mean survival, relative to its across-seed spread (ceil 0.50, load-bearing C2). BOTH DIRECTIONS DECLARED (carried from spike Sec 4.2): (i) invariant -> O's semantic grounding is NOT what produced EXQ-003's 6x survival; SD-004's efficiency rationale gets reframed and the 3-arm falsifier is re-priced downward to a correctness-not-capability run; (ii) varies -> O's content IS load-bearing and the 3-arm is worth its cost with a real prior of a behavioural effect. A NULL ON D2 IS A REAL RESULT, NOT A FAILURE. DV-SYMMETRY (per arm): D1's DV is a set-aggregate of argmax labels, invariant under uniform additive shifts and monotone rescalings of the decoder outputs -- a weight re-draw is neither (it moves ao_mean/ao_std per-coordinate and non-monotonically at the refit, so the argmax can change). D2's DVs are symmetric under permutation of episodes and seeds, and the manipulation is applied WITHIN a seed with the downstream RNG held identical, so it is orthogonal to that symmetry. Neither delta is an arithmetic identity fixed before the run. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is the spread of EXQ-003's terrain-advantage DVs across ao-head re-initialisations; checked EXQ-003's manifests, the SD-004 evidence surface and the spike's raw arrays -- no recorded run varies the head's init, so it is neither recorded nor derivable post-hoc. Not recoverable -> run. claim_ids is SD-004 only: SD-080 is not yet registered in claims.yaml, and this probe exercises SD-004's rationale rather than SD-080's factual content (which the spike measured directly). SD-080 carried in custom_information.related_claims. GATES the 3-arm falsifier, which additionally needs an /implement-substrate build (a default-off consequence-grounding auxiliary loss on action_object_head; SD-056's contrastive objective is NOT directly reusable -- it pushes ACTIONS apart, whereas this head's deficiency is that STATES are unrepresented). Smoke PASS.

items.title: MECH-440 pre-commit distribution SHAPE falsifier (708a same-question re-run: discriminate saturated vs lever-downstream)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC; PROMOTES AND DEMOTES NOTHING; routes to /failure-autopsy, NOT to /implement-substrate (the 708a autopsy sets recommended_substrate_queue_entry.action='none' -- no substrate build is warranted until (i) vs (ii) is settled). Same-question re-run of V3-EXQ-708a; the design, arms, seeds, phases, stack and env are UNCHANGED and only the READOUT changes. WHY: 708a's instrument repair WORKED (862 genuinely-fresh E3 select() calls vs a floor of 30, 4 divergent seeds, supra-floor and non-trivial-vs-raw noise bias range 0.221, live dACC suppression, dissociable finer channels), and its substantive finding is that NEITHER designed lever moves the DV: ARM_TEMP raises pre-commit sampling-class entropy above A0_OFF on 0 of 4 divergent seeds and ARM_NOISE_SINGLE on 1 of 4, against a bar of 2. That is a failed MANIPULATION CHECK on a working instrument, not an unready substrate (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-708a_2026-07-22, user-adjudicated; epistemic_category measurement_gap, explicitly NOT substrate_ceiling). Two readings are live and are NOT separable from 708a's manifest, which records only the between-arm entropy DELTA: (i) H-precommit-saturated -- the distribution is already argmax-like with no headroom (the MECH-439 F-dominance signature, observed PRE-commit); (ii) H-lever-downstream -- the levers are applied downstream of where the pre-commit distribution is formed. THREE READOUT CHANGES: (1) records the pre-commit distribution's SHAPE per genuinely-fresh select -- max_prob, participation ratio 1/sum(p^2), effective support at a 0.05 mass floor, top-3 mass profile, plus the CLASS-level analogues -- aggregated per arm per seed INTO THE MANIFEST (never a per_tick_sink; Phase 3 transports only manifest_bytes). Discriminator: under (i) max_prob is near 1 in EVERY arm including A0_OFF; under (ii) max_prob differs by arm while entropy does not. (2) instruments each lever's ARRIVAL at the pre-commit softmax with NO ree_core edit: the applied temperature is recovered exactly by inverting probs=softmax(-scores/T) (e3_selector.py:2742) against the same-tick last_scores (:2712, post-explore-term) and last_precommit_probs (:2747); the MECH-440 explore term is witnessed per tick via e3._last_explore_term, set at :2698 where scores=scores+ _explore_term -- both upstream of that softmax. SMOKE VERIFIED THE RECOVERY AGAINST GROUND TRUTH: rel_lift 1.499317 measured for a configured alpha=1.5 on base 1.0 (expected 1.5), and explore_frac 1.0 on the noise arm. (3) reclassifies temperature_control_raises_precommit_entropy and weight_noise_raises_precommit_entropy from kind:readiness to MANIPULATION CHECKS carried under interpretation.recorded_preconditions with an explicit preconditions_scope_note (the V3-EXQ-737 pattern), because build_experiment_indexes._compute_adjudication reads the flat preconditions list ARM-BLIND and returns whole-run precondition_unmet on the first unmet entry -- which is exactly what filed 708a's working instrument as 'substrate not ready'. A null there now reports as a RESULT. UNCHANGED and not in question: the 708a instrument repair (clear e3.last_score_diagnostics/.last_precommit_probs to None immediately before every select_action, record ONLY if repopulated; 708b additionally clears .last_scores, newly load-bearing for the temperature recovery). LOAD-BEARING criterion is D1, the (i)-vs-(ii) discrimination -- NOT MECH-440 propagation, which 708a showed the manipulation cannot currently reach; a criterion gated on propagation would be unreachable-by-construction (the V3-EXQ-785 structural-vacuity shape). C1 is retained non-load-bearing for comparability. MECH-440 is non_contributory in every branch except the retained supports branch. DV-SYMMETRY (mandatory per-arm declaration): A0_OFF has no manipulation. ARM_TEMP -- the DV is the pre-commit SHAPE, whose symmetry group is candidate permutation plus any probability-preserving map; a temperature change rescales the logits and strictly changes max_prob for any non-constant score vector, so it is NOT invariant. ARM_NOISE_SINGLE -- the MECH-440 term is a PER-CANDIDATE vector, not a broadcast scalar (708a measured noisy_selection_bias_range 0.221, a non-zero cross-candidate RANGE, which is the measured refutation of the 604c broadcast-constant case), and max_prob is not invariant under a non-uniform additive score perturbation. Noted as a live hypothesis rather than a defect: the OLD DV, pre-commit CLASS entropy, IS invariant under redistribution of mass within a class, and would be pinned at 0 in every arm if the k=3 shortlist holds candidates sharing one first-action class -- precommit_n_distinct_classes_mean measures exactly that. RE-DERIVE BRAKE not fired (708a's category is measurement_gap with action 'none', so the counting rule is not met). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is the per-fresh-select pre-commit shape + recovered applied temperature; checked v3_exq_708a_..._20260720T211903Z_v3 and v3_exq_708_..._20260628T220908Z_v3, both record only the between-arm pre-commit class-entropy scalar with no shape moments and no per-tick sink -> not recoverable by reanalysis -> run. Prefer a cloud worker over the Mac. QUEUE-ENTRY PROVENANCE: added via coordinator POST /queue/add rather than a git append, because the working tree carried session suspicious-bartik-8c8d67's UNCOMMITTED V3-EXQ-792a entry and a whole-file read-modify-write would have swept their in-flight work into this commit (CLAUDE.md read-modify-write contamination). Script landed separately on origin/main at ree-v3 99ed3db386 BEFORE this POST, per the atomicity rule.

items.title: MECH-048 DIAGNOSTIC: does environmentally-driven mu change BEHAVIOUR via the mode-prior temperature, or only the entropy arithmetic?
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC spike (experiment_purpose=diagnostic; excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring -- yields ROUTING, not verdicts). Validates the SD-032d amendment landed 2026-07-21 (substrate_queue row sd_032d_mu_kappa_mode_prior_overlays, implemented_pending_validation): mu (pcc_stability) now reaches the mode PRIOR via softmax temperature tau = softmax_temperature * exp(a_k*kappa - a_mu*mu), where before it reached only the switch threshold and H(operating_mode) was EXACTLY mu-invariant (0.167605 at mu 0.0/1.0/3.0). WHY NOT EVIDENCE: MECH-048 is at exp=0 (confirmed: no manifest carries it) and two of the three ways this run can end are substrate readouts, not claim verdicts -- so a diagnostic that ROUTES to a powered evidence run is the honest first entry. A vacuous first entry would corrupt the claim. VACUITY CONSTRAINT (why V3-EXQ-683 was HELD, not repaired): with mu injected directly, 'entropy falls as mu rises' is an ARITHMETIC IDENTITY of the coupling -- the DV-symmetry class of failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-604c s3. 683 set pcc_stability values and read H(softmax(scores/T)); its delta was fixed before the run. This design instead (1) drives mu ONLY from upstream environment -- resource/hazard density plus a rest schedule, with task outcomes read from env total_benefit/total_harm deltas into PCCAnalog; pcc_stability is never written -- and (2) reads a trajectory-level BEHAVIOURAL DV as a difference-in-differences against a coupling-OFF control, which carries every non-temperature env->behaviour path. The interaction is zero unless entropy modulation PROPAGATES into action, which no arithmetic fixes. mu->tau->H is recorded as mechanism-confirmation only (precondition kind=mechanism, never load_bearing). DV-SYMMETRY PER ARM: DVs are set-aggregates (permutation-invariant) over the realized state/action sequence. The manipulation is NOT invariant under that group because write_gate('e3_policy') MULTIPLIES the per-candidate dACC score-bias VECTOR (agent.py:5790), re-weighting one additive term against the others -- not a broadcast additive constant. dacc_foraging_weight is deliberately 0.0 because it is a broadcast scalar (the 604c shape). OCCUPANCY LIMIT HANDLED: MECH-048's switching-pressure half is NOT measurable (464b/464c/467d/464d all report fraction_in_external_task=0.0); that is scoped to substrate_queue row sd_salience_contested_mode_occupancy and is NOT tested here. This run is safe from it because write_gate reads the SOFT operating_mode vector, so temperature modulates the gate continuously at ZERO switches. No occupancy-dependent DV is used. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readouts are mode_entropy / effective_temperature / pcc_stability under a live use_pcc_analog. No experiment has EVER exercised use_pcc_analog (0 manifests) and the two tick() readouts only landed 2026-07-21, so nothing is recoverable -> run. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: count 0 for MECH-048, not braked. SMOKE FOUND FOUR REAL DEFECTS, all fixed and all invisible without running it: (a) dacc_bias cross-candidate range was 0.0 in every arm because DACCtoE3Adapter multipliers default to 0 ('the bias is the zero vector regardless of bundle content') -- the gate scaled ZERO and the run was a GUARANTEED NULL; dacc_weight/dacc_interaction_weight now set, range measured 0.03-0.79. (b) outcome fed from raw harm_signal INVERTED the manipulation (continuous proximity harm is negative on ~72% of STABLE steps) giving mu_separation -0.013; now read from total_benefit/total_harm deltas, both outcome classes populated. (c) the rest schedule NEVER fired (steps_since_rest was reset per episode; episodes ~24 steps vs a 50-step interval) so the primary mu channel was dead -- now cross-episode, mirroring PCCAnalog.reset() which deliberately does not reset _steps_since_offline. (d) the drafted VOLATILE regime killed the agent in 2-3 steps vs STABLE's 38, which would have depressed visitation entropy MECHANICALLY; VOLATILE is now survivable and every arm consumes an IDENTICAL fixed step budget so episode length cannot confound the DV. PCC WEIGHTS RE-SCOPED (declared, not hidden): substrate defaults (fatigue 0.5 / offline 0.3 / window 500) pin mu at ~0.017 against the [0,1] clip because drive_level saturates at 0.9 -- a structurally unsatisfiable precondition in the V3-EXQ-785 sense. Set to 0.15/0.35/200 so the manipulation CAN reach the gate. MU_SEPARATION_FLOOR is UNCHANGED at 0.15 -- the threshold was never lowered. POST-FIX SMOKE (12% of full scale): mechanism live -- mode_entropy response 0.888, tau 1.0->0.62, gate moves 0.577->0.623, mu_coupling_gap 0.0002 (mu confirmed upstream), and seed 43 VOLATILE shows the coupling actually CHANGING behaviour (vis 0.4150->0.4222, act 0.0->0.052). It self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale, which is CORRECT: mu_separation 0.104 vs floor 0.15 and fresh_select ~57 vs floor 100 are both dry-run scale artifacts (480 steps vs 4000 at full scale, where fresh_select ~480 and VOLATILE offline_recency saturates -> predicted separation ~0.29). A below-floor result at FULL scale self-routes to requeue, never to a substrate verdict. MEASUREMENT: all coordinator/PCC readouts are E3-fresh-gated via _lib/fresh_select (cadence 10; measured yield 0.119, replication factor 8.4 avoided); n_latched_ticks emitted. ALL-GREEN GATE is deliberate and is NOT the 785 AND-defect: the DV is a single DiD contrast spanning all four arms, so it is uninterpretable unless every arm is readable; per_arm_gate is still emitted per arm.

items.title: ARC-003 LEG A: does E3 SELECT? commitment-free score-level lesion contrast (KL of selected-candidate distribution vs the proposer's generation prior)
items.note: From EXP-0394 (REE_assembly evidence/planning/manual_proposals.v1.json, minted by /thought-digestion 2026-07-21). claim_ids=[ARC-003] ONLY -- the proposal's related_claims (ARC-005/ARC-002/ARC-001/INV-012/MECH-060/061/062/Q-015/Q-016) are deliberately NOT tagged; this run does not exercise their mechanisms. ARC-003 carries 45 reverse dependencies on exp_conf 0.0 with ZERO experiments ever run (lit_conf 0.783 from 3 supports only), so this is its first experimental evidence of any kind. CONJUNCTIVE CLAIM, ONE LEG: tests LEG A (E3 SELECTS) at the candidate-SCORING level with NO sustained multi-step action commitment anywhere in the design. LEG B (E3 COMMITS) is BLOCKED on the BG/action-commitment layer (ARC-107 constitution; MECH-448 provisional; MECH-449 substrate_conditional; 460j/485i/654h pending) and is registered separately as EXP-0395 blocked_substrate. The commitment-free scope is the standing rule from IGW-20260620-194: a behavioural DV here would RE-DERIVE THE F-DOMINANCE CONVERSION CEILING and return a confounded FAIL rather than adjudicate ARC-003. DESIGN: the driver calls agent.e3.select() DIRECTLY rather than agent.select_action(), which interposes the E3 cadence (heartbeat.e3_steps_per_tick default 10), the commitment latch and the BetaGate -- i.e. exactly the machinery leg B is blocked on. Consequence: every tick is one genuine independent selection, so the V3-EXQ-785 ~9x diagnostics pseudo-replication defect is STRUCTURALLY IMPOSSIBLE (n_latched_ticks = 0 by construction, emitted as 0, not merely guarded). SCOPE: score_bias / score_bias_channels / channel_route_bias are NOT injected, so this tests E3's OWN scoring authority (F/M/Phi_R) and licenses nothing about the modulatory channels (MECH-314/341/320). DV = KL(executed first-action-class distribution || per-tick candidate-pool generation prior). Any content-free selector draws uniformly over candidates and reproduces the prior, so KL>0 is exactly the signature of 'the selector used information about the candidates'. ARMS: A0_INTACT (take E3's pick) / A1_E3_LESIONED (select() still runs so E3 state and scores evolve identically, but the EXECUTED candidate is drawn UNIFORMLY over the untouched pool) / ARM_NOISE (E3's REAL score vector randomly PERMUTED across candidates, same argmin rule -- score DISTRIBUTION held exactly fixed, content destroyed). Candidate GENERATION is untouched in every arm. DV-SYMMETRY, declared per arm: the DV's symmetry group is permutations of candidates within a class, slot relabellings preserving per-tick class counts, and any score transform preserving the within-tick argmin (incl. a uniform additive constant -- the V3-EXQ-604c broadcast-scalar trap). A0's manipulation is NOT invariant (state-dependent per-candidate score whose cross-candidate RANGE is measured and gated). A1 and ARM_NOISE ARE invariant BY CONSTRUCTION and are DECLARED REFERENCE ARMS estimating the sampling floor at this n; neither is cited as a measured effect nor routes a verdict alone. They are kept as TWO nulls because they hold DIFFERENT things fixed (rule vs score distribution), so agreement strengthens the floor and disagreement is diagnostic. VERIFIED-LIFTING (the V3-EXQ-689d defect, where a matched-noise control was bit-identical to its sibling and 'strict above BOTH' degraded silently to 'strict above one'): P5 lesion_took is GATING on each null arm. CRITERIA: C1 (load-bearing) KL_A0 exceeds BOTH nulls by max(0.02, 2 x SD of the per-seed delta); C2 (load-bearing) cross-candidate score RANGE normalised by scale above floor -- a RANGE and never a mean-abs proxy, per the V3-EXQ-643 same-statistic rule; C3 (NOT load-bearing) taken-candidate argmin-hit above 1/K chance, scored on the UNCOMMITTED subset ONLY because on the committed path selection IS a deterministic argmin (e3_selector.py:1891) and the statistic is an arithmetic identity there. NON-DEGENERACY: P1 cand_world_pairwise_dist above floor (the GAP-A guard -- V3-EXQ-571 measured this collapse at 0.0000 across K=8); P2 mean distinct first-action classes per pool > 1.5, the easy-to-miss one, because on a single-class pool the prior is a point mass and KL is IDENTICALLY 0 for EVERY arm including A0, so the contrast would read as a clean FAIL while measuring nothing; P3 score magnitude bounded (the 643 float32-cancellation regime); P4 selection count; P5 lesion_took, SCOPED OUT of A0 via applies_to with a structural_max proof (A0's override rate is 0 by definition, so asserting it would make A0 un-passable -- the V3-EXQ-785 defect). Gates are per-arm via _lib/precondition_gate.py + aggregate_arm_gates. C1 is a CROSS-ARM CONTRAST so a red null arm makes it unscorable (routes non_contributory, NOT a refutation) -- that is the arithmetic of a difference, not the 785 vacating defect; C2/C3 are A0-internal and still score. TRAINING: P0 warmup (E1 + E2.self + world-decoder recon + world_forward MSE + the SD-056 InfoNCE action-contrastive auxiliary) then frozen eval; no downstream head is trained on a latent so the P1 detach phase does not apply. The contrastive term is included specifically because reconstruction-shaped training fits the action contribution to zero (V3-EXQ-571/SD-056), which would collapse the pool and trip P1. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is the KL above under an E3-lesion contrast; ARC-003 has ZERO recorded experiments (genuine_exp_count 0) so no manifest carries it or its inputs -- not recoverable, must run. items.title: ARC-016: eval-derived commit-threshold recalibration -- closes the 'pending recalibration with eval-derived threshold' item that killed the EXQ-396 series (structural only)
items.note: From EXP-0397 (REE_assembly evidence/planning/manual_proposals.v1.json, minted by /thought-digestion 2026-07-21). claim_ids=[ARC-016] ONLY. NOT A DISCOVERY EXPERIMENT and it PROMOTES NOTHING: ARC-016's core circuit (E3-derived variance -> relative commit threshold -> BetaGate -> action_selection) is ALREADY VALIDATED by V3-EXQ-018b (PASS 5/5: stable commit_rate 0.90 / precision 718, perturbed 0.50 / 426 -- a 40% precision drop producing a proportional 40-point commit-rate drop) and V3-EXQ-060 (PASS 4/5: committed_step_count 5980, hold_rate_during_committed 0.936). This closes the SINGLE open item named verbatim in the claim's own notes: 'pending recalibration with eval-derived threshold'. THE 396 DEATH: EXQ-396a (x3) and EXQ-396b were ALL reclassified non_contributory on a TRAIN/EVAL VARIANCE GAP -- train variance ~0.000032-0.000064 against eval ~0.001 (~15-30x), so a threshold at 2 x training_baseline_variance sits far below the variance it must discriminate, the gate committed = running_variance < effective_threshold (e3_selector.py:2792) never fires in eval, and every arm is identical. Nobody has since re-run it with an eval-derived threshold. ARMS (the baseline-variance SOURCE is the ONLY manipulated factor): A0_TRAIN_BASELINE (2 x last-60-episode TRAINING rv -- reproduces the 396 configuration as the pre-registered NEGATIVE REFERENCE, expected NOT to engage) / A1_EVAL_DERIVED (2 x rv over an EVAL-time calibration window run in the STABLE reference condition under the SAME reset protocol the scored evals use) / A2_ONLINE_ADAPTED (2 x a SLOW trailing EMA of rv). The threshold is derived ONCE from the reference condition and HELD FIXED across the manipulated precision levels -- deriving it per-condition would ABSORB the manipulation, the same reason 018b calibrated on stable then evaluated stable-vs-perturbed. Precision manipulation is 018b's extreme pairing (stable 2 hazards / drift_interval 200 / p=0.0 vs perturbed 25 / 1 / p=1.0). SCOPE GUARD -- STRUCTURAL ONLY: post-split (2026-03-22) ARC-016 covers just the mechanistic circuit; the behavioural consequence layer is ARC-029 and is NOT tagged or tested. NO behavioural harm DV is attached, which would re-import the V_s MONOSTRATEGY-LOCK confound that voided EXQ-454. The exclusion is STRUCTURAL, not a promise: the driver takes RANDOM actions throughout (as 018b/396 did) so there is no learned policy that could lock into a single strategy, and no harm/benefit quantity is a DV anywhere. Calling e3.select() directly also makes every call one genuine independent selection (E3 cadence + commitment latch not in the path), so the V3-EXQ-785 ~9x pseudo-replication defect is structurally impossible; n_latched_ticks = 0 by construction. NON-DEGENERACY -- 'THE THRESHOLD MUST ACTUALLY ENGAGE' is a PRECONDITION, never a criterion, because a threshold that never fires makes all arms identical (exactly what voided 396a/b) and must self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue rather than deliver a verdict. P2 engagement headroom = min(commit_rate, 1-commit_rate) over the WORST of the arm's TWO conditions -- a single-bound FLOOR on a worst-cell statistic so the indexer's recompute is exact (a half-declared two-sided band is the V3-EXQ-779b defect), and covering BOTH conditions rather than only the baseline partition (the V3-EXQ-779b/777 saturation-guard defect, which inspected the arm LEAST likely to saturate). SCOPED OUT of A0 via applies_to -- A0's designated role is to REPRODUCE the non-engagement, so asserting engagement there would make it structurally un-passable and collapse the three-arm design; A0's headroom is still measured and emitted NON-GATING under diagnostics.engagement_headroom_per_arm (with the offending seed/condition named), on PASS runs too. P1 precision_manipulation_took is RELATIVE ((rv_perturbed - rv_stable)/rv_stable > 0.25, worst cell) because rv's operating scale is itself what this run recalibrates against -- 018b's C1 was relative for the same reason -- and because an over-permissive absolute floor additionally lets a ~0 denominator blow up A2's tracking ratio. P3 commit-decision count; P4 calibrated threshold positive (018b's C0). DV-SYMMETRY, declared per arm: the DV (commit_rate) is invariant under any transform preserving the sign of (threshold - rv), i.e. any monotone transform applied JOINTLY to rv and threshold. A1 is NOT invariant -- the train- and eval-derived thresholds sit on OPPOSITE sides of the eval rv mass, so the sign flips for most ticks, and the realised ratio is emitted as threshold_ratio_eval_over_train so the claim is a NUMBER not an assertion. A0 is a declared REFERENCE arm with an expected-pinned DV. A2 carries a REAL invariance hazard -- a fast-adapting baseline makes rv < 2 x EMA(rv) true BY ARITHMETIC -- so its EMA is deliberately slow (alpha 0.002) and the realised absorption is MEASURED as a2_threshold_tracking_ratio; above the 0.5 ceiling C3 is declared criteria_non_degenerate:false and routes nothing. CRITERIA: C1 (load-bearing) commit_rate tracks precision in A1 -- stable minus perturbed > max(0.05, 2 x SD of the per-seed delta), the 018b direction; C2 (load-bearing) A0 REPRODUCES the 396 non-engagement (headroom below the P2 floor AND delta below margin) -- without it the run could only say 'some configuration works', not that 396 was a CALIBRATION ARTEFACT; C3 (NOT load-bearing) A2 also tracks, with its null declared (an online baseline that ABSORBS the perturbation is a result about adaptation TIMESCALE, not evidence against ARC-016). GRID: C1+C2 -> PASS/supports 396_series_was_calibration_artefact; C1 pass + C2 FAIL -> mixed tracking_holds_but_396_config_not_reproduced; C2 pass + C1 FAIL -> weakens commit_rate_does_not_track_precision, DECISION-FLIPPING -- with a threshold that demonstrably ENGAGES, the 15 prior FAILs would need re-reading as right for the wrong reasons and ARC-016 demotes from provisional; gate RED -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. DRIVER CONSTRAINT (V3-EXQ-396a): update_running_variance() has NO CALLER anywhere in ree_core, so the driver must drive the EMA itself or _running_variance stays pinned at precision_init and the gate never fires. Do not simplify away. GOVERNANCE FLAG, deliberately NOT acted on here: ARC-016's exp_conf 0.53 is an AGGREGATION ARTEFACT -- 15 FAILs, nearly all already stamped non_contributory or substrate-version-stale (heterogeneity_note), still score it as half-refuted. Re-scoring needs a governance eye, because stripping non-contributory FAILs can expose that the remaining supports are thinner than the headline number suggested. GOV-REUSE-1: 018b/018/396/396a(x3)/396b all derive the threshold from TRAINING variance BY CONSTRUCTION -- precisely the configuration reproduced here as the negative reference -- and none records an eval-time calibration window, so the readout is neither recorded nor derivable. Not recoverable, must run. RE-DERIVE BRAKE: literal count 0 for ARC-016. NEW EXQ NUMBER rather than a 396 letter because the manipulated factor (baseline-variance SOURCE) is a different scientific question from 396's hazard_harm sweep; no `supersedes` is set because 396a/396b are already non_contributory and there is no live scoring to displace. MINT-AS-YOU-GO: all cells stamped include_driver_script_in_hash=False. validate_experiments --strict PASS (0 warnings); dry-run smoke PASS end-to-end (3 arms x 2 seeds, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy budget as designed, dry manifest relocated out of evidence/). Progress instrumentation: the ep counter is CUMULATIVE across the cell's four phases (train 250 + calibrate 30 + eval_stable 40 + eval_perturbed 40 = 360) so there is ONE denominator per cell matching episodes_per_run -- per-phase denominators would make the runner's bar and ETA meaningless. ID HISTORY: authored as 801, renumbered to 803 then 805 to stay clear of a three-way race for 800/802. Script landed AHEAD of this entry (ree-v3 371d3b3a88).

items.title: ARC-007 path memory re-run superseding EXQ-114 (E3 selection + static control + harm-per-episode DV)
items.note: Replaces V3-EXQ-114, INVALIDATED by the action-object round-trip defect (ree-v3 6064f9075f). EXQ-114 selected via argmax(action_object_decoder(get_action_object_sequence()[:,0,:])) at lines 193/288 -- a CONSTANT function on this substrate (pins to class 3). Its MAP_NAV arm therefore executed action 3 at every eval step, walked into a wall, never terminated, and inflated the per-step harm-rate denominator ~14x (20000 steps vs 1420 ablated). The published 99.2% harm reduction reproduces with a ZERO AGENT (constant a=3: 10000/10000 steps, harm_rate 0.0059; random: 472/10000, 0.6886) and is not evidence for ARC-007 -- which matters because it is ARC-007's SOLE remaining behavioural support (EXQ-397/397c reclassified non_contributory 2026-04-22). Fixes: (1) selection via agent.select_action(candidates, ticks) = E3 J(zeta), never the decoder, the EXQ-042/053 pattern; (2) candidate first actions READ via HippocampalModule.candidate_first_action_class (trajectory.actions); (3) THIRD ARM A2_STATIC (constant env no-op, action 4) so the immobility artifact cannot produce a PASS -- C1 requires MAP_NAV to beat the BETTER of random and static; (4) PRIMARY DV = harm per EPISODE at a matched episode budget, with harm_per_step and step_denominator_ratio recorded but BARRED FROM EVERY CRITERION. Episode-termination counts, mean episode length, cells/episode and executed action classes recorded per arm. Deliberate design choice recorded in the docstring: a locomotion GATE was drafted and rejected -- action 4 is STAY and E3 minimises predicted harm, so 'stand still' is a real policy and a gate would misroute a genuine result as an instrument failure; the static control separates artifact from success instead. Only P1 candidate_action_diversity gates (>=2 distinct TRUE candidate first-action classes on a post-training positive control) -- if E3 has nothing to choose between, the arm is a no-op however selection is routed. Per-arm gate via _lib/precondition_gate (785 rule). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout is harm-per-episode against a static control under a non-degenerate action stream; scanned all 4 ARC-007/ARC-018 flat manifests -- none records harm_per_episode, none has a static/immobility arm, and all are pre-standard with substrate_hash null, so compatibility is unverifiable -> not recoverable, run. Re-derive brake NOT fired (ARC-007 count 0). NOT a duplicate of V3-EXQ-800 (ARC-007 leg 2 residue-scramble dissociation): 800 reproduces the leg-1 contrast only as an internal reference on per-step harm_rate with no static control; this is the leg-1 replacement. Smoke PASS (dry-run, 3 seeds x 3 arms, non_degenerate True, P1 green); validate_experiments --strict OK.

items.title: Q-020 valence geometry pair -- E3 selection, static control, per-episode DV (supersedes 266/266a)
items.note: Replaces V3-EXQ-266 and V3-EXQ-266a, both CONFIRMED invalidated by the action-object round-trip selection defect (ree-v3/CLAUDE.md 2026-07-22): each fed argmax(action_object_decoder(get_action_object_sequence()[:,0,:])) straight to env.step (266:269, 266a:281), a CONSTANT function on this substrate, so BOTH arms executed one identical action stream. All three published runs report harm_rate SHAPED == FLAT == 0.0060999999999999995 and harm_reduction_frac exactly 0.0. 266a is decisive: it repaired 266's ablation bug and its terrain_harm_corr DID move (-0.4384 vs +0.8415), so the manipulation reached the terrain while the behaviour stayed bit-identical -- an arithmetically forced no-op, not a null. Signature differs from EXQ-114: both arms ran the same constant policy, so denominators were EQUAL and the artifact hid as a perfect null rather than a 14x denominator inflation. FOUR FIXES (per the V3-EXQ-114a reference): (1) selection via agent.select_action(candidates, ticks) = E3's J(zeta), never the decoder; (2) candidate first actions read via HippocampalModule.candidate_first_action_class; (3) A2_STATIC no-op control arm so an immobility artifact cannot produce a PASS -- a locomotion gate was deliberately NOT used because action 4 is (0,0) STAY and 'stand still' is a legitimate low-harm policy; (4) primary DV is harm per EPISODE at a matched episode budget, with harm-per-step barred from every criterion. DV-SYMMETRY: DV = harm events per eval episode, a function of the executed action sequence produced by E3's ranking of J(zeta); symmetry group = candidate permutation, uniform additive constant across candidate scores, monotone rescaling of all scores. A0_TERRAIN_SHAPED -- residue enters BOTH the proposer's terrain prior (module.py:377) and E3's compute_residue_cost (e3_selector.py:1020,1046) as a PER-TRAJECTORY state-dependent cost: not invariant. A1_TERRAIN_FLAT -- withholds that write, removing a per-candidate term: not invariant. A2_STATIC -- fixed no-op, produces the maximal-denominator zero-locomotion trajectory: not invariant. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout = harm per episode under shaped-vs-flat residue with E3 selection; checked the three recorded 266/266a manifests -- all carry the defective action stream and none records substrate_hash (pre-2026-07-12), so not recoverable -> run. Re-derive brake: 0 counted autopsies on Q-020. Carries an explicit arms_bit_identical detector plus a residue_total ablation audit, either of which forces non_degenerate=false -> substrate_not_ready_requeue, so if the terrain still cannot reach behaviour at full scale the run says so instead of reporting a second false null.
